content.cn_text: 第二部分。
content.en_text: Part 2.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一名交通警察向一群听众介绍驾驶执照
content.en_text: You will hear a traffic police officer talking to a group of listeners about driving license

content.cn_text: 申请以及英国交通状况。
content.en_text: application and traffic conditions in the UK.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看第11至15题。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 11 to 15.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第11至15题。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 11 to 15.

content.cn_text: 大家好，我是 Edward，今天我来给大家介绍英国各地的
content.en_text: Hello, I'm Edward and I'm here to tell you about road conditions in various areas of

content.cn_text: 道路状况。
content.en_text: the UK.

content.cn_text: 我还会介绍英国的驾驶执照。
content.en_text: I'm also going to tell you about driver's licenses in the UK.

content.cn_text: 如果你从未持有过驾驶执照，或者你有其他国家的驾照，并且你
content.en_text: If you have never had a driver's license or you have one from another country and you

content.cn_text: 想要获得英国驾照，你必须是英国居民。
content.en_text: want to get a UK license, you must be a UK resident.

content.cn_text: 当你的英国驾照需要更新时，你需要出示医疗报告。
content.en_text: You will need to show a medical report when your UK license needs to be renewed.

content.cn_text: 如果你想翻译原来的外国驾照，以申请英国
content.en_text: If you are trying to translate your original foreign driving license to apply for a UK

content.cn_text: 驾照，如果你想在这里开车，这是必须的，那么你需要去
content.en_text: license, which is a must if you want to be able to drive here, you will need to visit

content.cn_text: 一家官方机构。
content.en_text: an official agency.

content.cn_text: 这些机构分布在伦敦各地，能够很好地帮助你处理
content.en_text: These are scattered throughout the London area and are well equipped to assist you with

content.cn_text: 你可能有的任何问题，而且它们提供的任何服务都包含在驾照费用中。
content.en_text: any questions you might have and any services they offer are included in your license fee.

content.cn_text: 如果你已经有翻译好的驾照，但需要更新一些个人信息，
content.en_text: If you already have a translated license but need some personal information updating,

content.cn_text: 你不需要为更新付费，他们会免费办理。
content.en_text: you do not need to pay for the update, they'll do it for free.

content.cn_text: 当你办理新驾照时，你可能需要重新拍照，因为有些
content.en_text: When you are getting a new driving license, you may need to have a new photo taken as some

content.cn_text: 照片会被拒绝。
content.en_text: photos are rejected.

content.cn_text: 如果你的照片太小其实没关系，因为我们可以用打印机把它放大。
content.en_text: It's actually okay if your photo is too small since we can get it enlarged with our printer.

content.cn_text: 大多数被拒绝的照片是那些使用奶油色背景拍摄的照片，而不是
content.en_text: The majority of rejected photos are the ones that were taken with a cream backdrop instead

content.cn_text: 单一灰色背景。
content.en_text: of a monotone grey background.

content.cn_text: 我们现在发现，使用后一种背景的照片能让我们更容易识别驾照持有人，
content.en_text: We've now found that photos with the latter allow us to identify the license holder much

content.cn_text: 识别起来更容易。
content.en_text: more easily.

content.cn_text: 如果你之前的照片里戴着眼镜，不用担心，
content.en_text: If you are wearing glasses on the previous photo, you don't need to worry about it since

content.cn_text: 因为这是允许的。
content.en_text: it is still allowed.

content.cn_text: 如果你不确定之前的驾照是否仍然有效，那么驾照查询
content.en_text: If you are not sure whether your previous license is still valid, then the license checking

content.cn_text: 服务就适合你。
content.en_text: service is for you.

content.cn_text: 流程相当清楚，你只需要按步骤操作。
content.en_text: The procedures are quite clear and you just have to follow them.

content.cn_text: 理想情况下，我希望这个流程能更快一些，因为它可能要花几个小时才能完成。
content.en_text: Ideally, I would like to see the process going faster since it can take hours to finish.

content.cn_text: 在我看来，如果所有申请人都带上必要的身份证明，会有帮助，
content.en_text: From my standpoint, it will help if all the applicants bring the necessary identification

content.cn_text: 那么他们只需要按照要求一步一步填写表格。
content.en_text: with them, then all they have to do is just fill in the forms accordingly, step by step.

content.cn_text: 经常有人问我，是否个人推荐最快或最便宜的
content.en_text: I'm often asked whether I have a personal recommendation about the fastest or cheapest

content.cn_text: 办理地点，但我认为这真的取决于你在哪里。
content.en_text: place to get all this done, but I think it really depends on where you are.

content.cn_text: 所有分支机构某些时候都可能很忙，一个分支机构空闲时，另一个可能很忙，
content.en_text: They can all get busy at some point and when it is quiet at one branch, it may be busy

content.cn_text: 所以你自己选择即可。
content.en_text: in another, so take your pick.

content.cn_text: 我只能说，价格绝对没有区别，都是标准费用。
content.en_text: All I would say is that there is absolutely no difference in price, it's a standard fee.

content.cn_text: 我唯一的建议是，完成申请最快的方法是填写
content.en_text: The only advice I would give is that the quickest way to complete an application is to fill out

content.cn_text: 网上表格，然后带着打印件去你选择的机构地点。
content.en_text: the form on the internet and then bring a print copy with you to the agency location

content.cn_text: 去你选择的机构地点。
content.en_text: of your choice.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余内容之前，你有一些时间查看第16至20题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the talk, you have some time to look at questions 16-20.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第16至20题。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 16-20.

content.cn_text: 接下来，人们经常问我对我们一些城市道路状况的看法。
content.en_text: Next, people frequently ask me what I think of the road conditions in some of our cities.

content.cn_text: 伦敦显然是最大也最繁忙的城市，有很多停车限制，
content.en_text: London is obviously the biggest and busiest and there are lots of parking restrictions,

content.cn_text: 还有单行系统等等，但总体来说，我发现交通标志非常清楚。
content.en_text: one-way systems and so on, but on the whole I find the traffic signs are very clear.

content.cn_text: 在爱丁堡，大多数人使用数字地图来了解当地交通和道路状况，
content.en_text: In Edinburgh, most people use digital maps to get to know local traffic and road conditions,

content.cn_text: 这些状况可以通过不同的交通流线来估计。
content.en_text: which can be estimated through different traffic flow lines.

content.cn_text: 它是一座灯之城，也就是交通灯之城，但这些交通灯非常高效，因为它们的计时
content.en_text: It is a city of lights, traffic lights, but they're extremely efficient as they're timed

content.cn_text: 非常精准，能让交通顺畅流动。
content.en_text: perfectly to get the traffic flowing smoothly.

content.cn_text: 这一点很重要，因为步行区和人行横道总是挤满了
content.en_text: That's important because pedestrian areas and crossings are always packed with people

content.cn_text: 行人，需要强有力的管理。
content.en_text: on foot, which needs strong regulation.

content.cn_text: 卡迪夫市以另一种方式解决交通流量问题。
content.en_text: The city of Cardiff has tackled traffic flow in a different way.

content.cn_text: 它最近完成了一项道路扩建计划，双向车道新增的车道
content.en_text: It recently completed a road expansion scheme and the extra lanes of the dual carriageway

content.cn_text: 正在缓解拥堵。
content.en_text: are easing congestion.

content.cn_text: 曼彻斯特的情况类似。
content.en_text: It's a similar story in Manchester.

content.cn_text: 大多数车辆选择环城路，而不是穿过市中心，以便
content.en_text: Instead of going through the town centre, most vehicles choose ring roads, so as to

content.cn_text: 避开市中心拥堵。
content.en_text: avoid the downtown congestion.

content.cn_text: 不过拥堵仍然可能发生，所以该市有可能引入检查点，
content.en_text: It can still happen though, so there's a possibility that the city will introduce checkpoints

content.cn_text: 让警察在高峰时段介入指挥交通。
content.en_text: where the police can intervene to direct traffic at peak periods.

content.cn_text: 最后，人们说条条大路通罗马，你也可以这样形容牛津。
content.en_text: And finally, they say all roads lead to Rome, and you could say that about Oxford.

content.cn_text: 我喜欢进出这座城市有很多选择，因为司机总能
content.en_text: I like the many options for getting in and out of the city because drivers can always

content.cn_text: 找到替代路线。
content.en_text: find alternative routes.

content.cn_text: 英国其他城市则是……
content.en_text: The other cities in the UK are...

content.cn_text: 第二部分到此结束。
content.en_text: That is the end of part two.

content.cn_text: 现在你有30秒时间检查第二部分的答案。
content.en_text: You now have 30 seconds to check your answers to part two.

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.
groups.title: Questions 11–15

items.title: What is the basic requirement for applying for a UK driving licence?

options.title: B
options.content: a valid licence from another country.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第11题问申请英国驾照的基本要求，原文说 must be a UK resident，对应 C “current residency in the UK”。

items.title: What is true about the translation of original licences?

options.title: A
options.content: applicants need to go to a recognised organisation.

options.title: B
options.content: it is not always necessary for foreigners when applying for a UK licence.

options.title: C
options.content: applicants need to pay an extra fee for translation services.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第12题问原驾照翻译哪项正确，原文说 need to visit an official agency，对应 A “go to a recognised organisation”。

items.title: When applying for a UK licence, which type of photos will NOT be approved?

options.title: A
options.content: photos in which the applicant is wearing glasses.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第13题问哪类照片不会被批准，原文说 rejected photos are ... with a cream backdrop，对应 B “photos with a cream background”。

items.title: What does the speaker think of the license checking service?

options.title: C
options.content: some of the steps are unnecessary.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第14题问说话人怎么看驾照查询服务，原文说希望 process going faster，因为会花数小时，对应 A “the process is too slow”。

items.title: What does the speaker recommend about making an application?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第15题问说话人建议如何申请，原文说 fill out the form on the internet，对应 C “completing the forms online”。

groups.desc: What is the current feature of traffic management in each of the following cities?
groups.title: Questions 16–20

items.title: London
items.analysis: 答案解析：第16题 London 的当前交通管理特征是 good signage。原文说 traffic signs are very clear，对应 A。

items.title: Edinburgh
items.analysis: 答案解析：第17题 Edinburgh 的特征是 effective traffic lights。原文说 traffic lights are extremely efficient，对应 F。

items.title: Cardiff
items.analysis: 答案解析：第18题 Cardiff 的特征是 additional lanes。原文说 extra lanes are easing congestion，对应 G。

items.title: Manchester
items.analysis: 答案解析：第19题 Manchester 的特征是 ring roads。原文说 most vehicles choose ring roads，对应 D。

items.title: Oxford
items.analysis: 答案解析：第20题 Oxford 的特征是 multiple access roads。原文说 many options for getting in and out of the city / alternative routes，对应 B。
